about.subtitle: About Weide Auto
about.storyText1: Weide Auto is headquartered in Fuyang City, Anhui Province, a professional automotive sales and service company with over a decade of industry experience. Our showroom is located at Suite 103-105, Phase 1, Hexie Xin Village, Development Zone, Fuyang City, offering a wide selection of vehicles in a spacious and professional facility.
about.storyText2: We specialize in new and used car retail and wholesale, leveraging years of industry expertise and stable partnerships with major automotive brands to provide high-quality, cost-effective vehicles for individual buyers and business clients alike.
about.storyText3: 'Quality First, Integrity Operations' is Weide Auto's core value. Every vehicle we offer represents our commitment to trust and transparency — all cars undergo rigorous professional inspection to ensure clear vehicle conditions and fair pricing.
about.value1Desc: Over a decade in the automotive industry with rich resources and strong reputation
about.value2Desc: Strict vehicle screening with professional inspection for transparent conditions
about.value3Desc: New and used cars in all categories to meet diverse customer needs
about.value4Desc: Transparent pricing, fair transactions, no hidden fees
about.businessNewDesc: Multi-brand new car dealership with professional purchase advisory
about.businessUsedDesc: Quality certified pre-owned vehicles with third-party inspection support
about.businessWholesaleDesc: Welcome dealers and corporate clients for bulk purchase cooperation
about.welcome: Visit our showroom or call us for inquiries
